Now write the final README:","type":"message"},{"arguments":"{"content":"# 🟢 Neon Marble VR\n\nA physics-based marble maze game built with IWSDK 0.4.1 — playable in VR headsets and desktop browsers.\n\n**[▶ Play Now](https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-marble/)**\n\n## Screenshots\n\n| Title Screen | Gameplay | Level Select |\n|:---:|:---:|:---:|\n| Neon holodeck title | Marble rolling through maze | Zone-based level grid |\n\n| Minimap | Ghost Replay | Victory Celebration |\n|:---:|:---:|:---:|\n| Bird's-eye level view | Transparent ghost marble | Firework particle bursts |\n\n## Features\n\n### Core Gameplay\n- **Physics-based marble rolling** — tilt the board to guide your marble through 36 handcrafted maze levels\n- **5 game modes**: Campaign, Time Attack, Zen, Daily Challenge (seeded PRNG), Survival (endless)\n- **11 tile types**: walls, holes, gems, teleporters, ice zones, boost pads, power-ups (shield/magnet/slow-mo), moving walls, gravity switches, bumpers\n- **6 level zones**: Classic, Power-Up, Endgame, Bumper, Master — progressive difficulty with all mechanics combined\n\n### VR + Browser\n- **Dual-runtime**: Full VR support (Meta Quest) with XR controller input + desktop browser fallback\n- **All UI is spatial PanelUI** — 17 `.uikitml` templates, zero HTML DOM overlays\n- **XR controller input**: Left thumbstick for board tilt, B to pause, laser pointer for all menus\n- **Head-following HUD** with score, timer, gems, lives, power-up indicators, combo display, zone indicator, speedrun split delta\n\n### Progression & Competition\n- **50 achievements** tracking every aspect of gameplay\n- **Star rating system** (1-3 stars per level based on par time + gem collection)\n- **Leaderboard** with top 20 scores\n- **Speed Run Timer** with per-level split tracking, PB comparison, total campaign timer\n- **Ghost replay system** — records your best run path and shows a transparent ghost marble on replay\n- **Survival mode** — shuffled endless play with 1 life, best run tracking\n\n### Challenge Modifiers\n- **No Power-ups** — removes all power-up pickups from levels\n- **Mirror Mode** — flipped/inverted controls\n- **Speed Demon** — 1.5x gravity for faster, harder gameplay\n\n### Visual Polish\n- **14 marble skins** with unique colors, glow effects, and trail particle styles (fire embers, frost crystals, toxic wisps, void implosion, golden shimmer, RGB glitch, starfield celestial, and more)\n- **Holodeck environment** with neon grid floor/ceiling, wireframe decorations, ambient particles, fog\n- **5 board themes**: Neon Holodeck, Crimson Grid, Toxic Neon, Ultra Violet, Solar Blaze\n- **Zone-based synthwave music** with crossfade transitions between 5 zone-specific tracks\n- **Screen shake** on wall bounces and falls\n- **Victory firework celebration** with staggered particle bursts and triumphant fanfare\n- **Level transition animations** (fade in/out between levels)\n- **Mini-map** (3D bird's-eye follower panel showing level layout with marble position dot)\n- **Tutorial overlay** for first-time players on the first 3 levels\n\n### Audio\n- **Procedural Web Audio**: 16+ SFX (bounce, roll, gem collect, fall, teleport, boost, ice slide, bumper, combo, power-up pickup, shield break, magnet pull, victory fanfare, achievement, countdown, button click)\n- **5 zone-specific synthwave tracks** (C/F/D/G/E minor) with LFO modulation and crossfade transitions\n- **Combo system SFX** with rising pitch based on combo chain count\n\n## Controls\n\n| Action | Keyboard | VR Controller |\n|--------|---------|--------------|\n| Tilt board | WASD / Arrow keys | Left thumbstick |\n| Pause | Escape | B button |\n| Menu navigation | Mouse click | Laser pointer + trigger |\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- **IWSDK 0.4.1** (Immersive Web SDK) with WebXR\n- **Three.js** (via @iwsdk/core)\n- **PanelUI** (@pmndrs/uikit + @iwsdk/vite-plugin-uikitml)\n- **Vite** for development and production builds\n- **TypeScript** — strict mode, zero errors\n- **Web Audio API** — fully procedural, no audio file dependencies\n\n## Project Stats\n\n- **36 levels** across 6 zones (Classic, Power-Up, Endgame, Bumper, Master)\n- **50 achievements**\n- **14 marble skins** with unique trail effects\n- **17 PanelUI templates** (`.uikitml`)\n- **5 game modes** (Campaign, Time Attack, Zen, Daily Challenge, Survival)\n- **3 challenge modifiers** (No Power-ups, Mirror Mode, Speed Demon)\n- **~6,200 lines** of TypeScript across 7 source files\n- **Zero HTML DOM overlays** — all UI is XR-compatible spatial PanelUI\n\n## Development\n\n```bash\n# Install dependencies\nnpm install\n\n# Start dev server\nnpm run dev\n\n# Build for production\nnpm run build\n\n# Type check\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n## License\n\nBuilt as a demo project for IWSDK 0.4.1.\n","path":"neon-marble/README.md"}","call_id":"toolu_01BwJfYxs5gmGAqaEm4kJFyG","name":"write","type":"function_call"},{"call_id":"toolu_01BwJfYxs5gmGAqaEm4kJFyG","output":"wrote 4619 bytes to # IWSDK Daily Builds Log

Track all daily builds to avoid repeating ideas.

## Completed Builds
[1827 more lines in file. Use offset=6 to continue.]

summary:
Context checkpoint compaction summary:
## Context Checkpoint: Neon Marble VR Build — Rounds 7-8

### Task
Continue the Neon Marble VR build (IWSDK 0.4.1 marble maze game) for rounds 7-8, targeting 90 more build-minutes to reach the 360-minute total.

### Current Progress
**Both rounds (7 and 8) are COMPLETE. Code is committed, built, and deployed to GitHub Pages.** The remaining work is solely administrative: updating BUILD_LOG.md, writing latest-build-summary.md, and optionally capturing a journal JSONL.

#### Round 7 (Done)
- Ghost replay system (`src/ghost.ts`): records marble path at 50ms intervals, saves best run per level to localStorage, shows transparent wireframe ghost marble on replay
- 3D mini-map (`src/minimap.ts`): Follower-attached bird's-eye view of level layout with marble position dot marker
- Screen shake (`ScreenShake` class in `src/effects.ts`): triggers on wall bounces (intensity scales with speed) and falls, exponential decay
- Victory firework celebration (`fireworkBurst` in `src/effects.ts`): 5 staggered multi-colored particle bursts + triumphant C-E-G-C fanfare with harmony (`playVictoryFanfare` in `src/audio.ts`)
- 5 new achievements reaching 50 total: Ghost Chaser, Cartographer, Shake It Off, Fireworks Fan, Half Century
- New tracking fields in GameStateManager: `ghostRaced`, `minimapLevelsUsed`, `wallBounces`, `victoryCelebrations`
- Zero TypeScript errors, deployed

#### Round 8 (Done)
- Tutorial overlay system (`ui/tutorial.uikitml`): first-play guidance for levels 0-2 with dismiss button, Follower-attached
- 3 challenge modifiers in Settings panel: No Power-ups, Mirror Mode (flipped controls), Speed Demon (1.5x gravity)
- 2 new marble skins (14 total): Glitch (RGB shift, jittery particles) and Celestial (starfield, slow drifting sparkles)
- Level transition fade animation (black overlay mesh with opacity transitions)
- Improved goal ring celebration (pulsing emissive intensity)
- Final README.md with full feature list, controls, tech stack, project stats
- 17 PanelUI `.uikitml` templates, zero HTML DOM overlays
- Zero TypeScript errors, deployed

### Key Project Stats (Final)
- **Total build minutes**: 360 (target reached)
- **Status**: `"complete"` in status JSON
- **Files**: 24 source files (7.ts + 17.uikitml)
- **Lines**: ~6,102 total
- **Levels**: 36 across 6 zones
- **Achievements**: 50
- **Marble skins**: 14
- **Game modes**: 5 (Campaign, Time Attack, Zen, Daily, Survival)
- **Challenge modifiers**: 3 (No Power-ups, Mirror Mode, Speed Demon)
- **Deployed at**: https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-marble/
- **Git branch**: `master` (not `main`)

### What Was Already Done
- `current-build-status.json` updated with rounds 7+8, status set to `"complete"`, total_build_minutes=360
- Code committed and pushed to `master` for both rounds
- `dist/` built and force-pushed to `gh-pages` for both rounds
- `dist/.git` cleaned up after each deploy

### What Remains To Be Done
1. **Append rounds 7 and 8 to `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/BUILD_LOG.md`** — the file was read at showing it has existing content (1832 lines). Need to append round 7 and 8 entries at the end (under the existing `## Completed Builds` section or wherever the previous rounds are logged).

2. **Overwrite `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/latest-build-summary.md`** with current final state summary.

3. **Journal capture** (optional): Copy session JSONL into `.agent/journal/` in the game repo, commit and push. The task mentions this but it's a best-effort item.

### Constraints & Conventions
- Git remote branch is `master`, NOT `main`
- GitHub token does NOT have `workflow` scope — use direct gh-pages branch deployment only
- All UI must be PanelUI (.uikitml) — zero HTML DOM overlays (verified: 17 templates, no DOM usage)
- IWSDK dev skill located at `~/workspace/skills/iwsdk-dev/SKILL.md`
- Checkin protocol at `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/checkin-protocol.md`
- Build log path: `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/BUILD_LOG.md`
- Summary path: `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/latest-build-summary.md`
- Status JSON path: `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/current-build-status.json` (already updated)

item.name: write
item.arguments:
{"content":"# Latest Build Summary — Neon Marble VR

**Status:** ✅ COMPLETE  
**Date:** 2026-05-29  
**Total Build Time:** 360 minutes (6 hours, 8 rounds)  
**Repo:** https://github.com/ellyz2426/neon-marble  
**Live:** https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-marble/  
**Framework:** IWSDK 0.4.1 (dual-runtime: VR headset + browser)

## Project Stats

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Source files | 24 (7 .ts + 17 .uikitml) |
| Lines of code | ~6,102 |
| Levels | 36 across 6 zones |
| Game modes | 5 |
| Challenge modifiers | 3 |
| Tile types | 11 |
| Marble skins | 14 |
| Achievements | 50 |
| Power-ups | 3 |
| SFX | 18+ procedural Web Audio |
| Music zones | 5 synthwave tracks |
| Board themes | 5 |
| UI templates | 17 PanelUI (.uikitml) |
| HTML DOM overlays | 0 |
| TypeScript errors | 0 |

## Game Modes
1. **Campaign** — 36 levels, 3 lives, progressive difficulty
2. **Time Attack** — Race against par times
3. **Zen** — No lives, no timer, relaxed play
4. **Daily Challenge** — Date-seeded PRNG puzzle
5. **Survival** — Endless shuffled levels, 1 life

## Challenge Modifiers
- **No Power-ups** — Removes all pickups
- **Mirror Mode** — Flipped controls
- **Speed Demon** — 1.5x gravity

## 6 Zones (36 Levels)
1. **Neon Basics** (1-6) — Fundamentals
2. **Warp Zone** (7-12) — Teleporters & ice
3. **Power Zone** (13-18) — Power-ups introduced
4. **Endgame** (19-24) — Moving walls & gravity switches
5. **Bumper Zone** (25-30) — Bumper physics & combos
6. **Master Zone** (31-36) — All 11 tile types combined

## 11 Tile Types
Wall, Hole, Gem, Goal, Start, Teleporter A/B, Ice, Boost, Shield/Magnet/SlowMo pickups, Moving Wall, Gravity Switch, Bumper

## 14 Marble Skins
Classic, Neon Blaze, Frost Byte, Lava Core, Phantom, Diamond Core, Nebula Drift, Emerald Vein, Obsidian Shard, Prismatic, Void Walker, Chrome Sphere, Glitch, Celestial — each with unique trail particle effects

## 50 Achievements
Spanning gem collection, speed runs, falls, combos, game mode completions, skin collection, ghost racing, minimap usage, wall bounces, victory celebrations, and more.

## Key Systems
- **Physics:** Gravity-based marble rolling with tilt controls, wall collision (AABB), ice friction, boost impulse, bumper springs
- **Audio:** 18+ procedural SFX via Web Audio API + 5-zone synthwave music with crossfade transitions + victory fanfare
- **Ghost Replay:** Records marble path at 50ms intervals, replays best run as transparent wireframe ghost
- **Mini-map:** 3D Follower-attached bird's-eye view with marble position marker
- **Screen Shake:** Wall bounce and fall shake with exponential decay
- **Speed Run Timer:** Per-level splits with PB comparison
- **Combo System:** 2-second chain window, up to 5x multiplier
- **Tutorial:** First-play guidance overlays for first 3 levels
- **Scoring:** Base 1000 + time bonus + gem bonus (200ea) + perfect run (500) + combo multiplier
- **Star Rating:** 1-3 stars per level (complete / under par / under par + all gems)
- **Persistence:** localStorage for progress, best times, scores, achievements, skins, ghost runs, splits, tutorial state, challenge modifiers

## UI Architecture
All 17 UI panels use IWSDK PanelUI (.uikitml spatial XML templates). Zero HTML DOM overlays. Follower-attached HUD, toast notifications, mini-map, and tutorial.

## Build Rounds
1. **Round 1** (45 min) — Core engine, 12 levels, 6 tile types, 4 game modes, 13 UI panels, 20 achievements, holodeck environment, full audio, XR + browser input
2. **Round 2** (45 min) — 3 power-ups, 6 levels (18), star ratings, 5 skins, stats panel, 10 achievements (30)
3. **Round 3** (45 min) — Moving walls, gravity switches, 6 endgame levels (24), 3 skins (8), 5 achievements (35)
4. **Round 4** (45 min) — Bumper tile, combo system, 6 bumper zone levels (30), 4 skins (12), 5 achievements (40)
5. **Round 5** (45 min) — 6 Master Zone levels (36), Survival mode, 5 achievements (45), trail color per skin
6. **Round 6** (45 min) — Zone-based synthwave music, speed run timer with splits, 12 skin-specific trail particles
7. **Round 7** (45 min) — Ghost replay, 3D mini-map, screen shake, victory fireworks + fanfare, 5 achievements (50)
8. **Round 8** (45 min) — Tutorial overlays, 3 challenge modifiers, 2 skins (14), level transitions, final README — **360 min target reached**
","mode":"overwrite","path":"iwsdk-daily-builds/latest-build-summary.md"}
